reason: Video contains no FLS task content. Frames show a physician (Dr. Salomon Corral) standing in front of da Vinci Surgical System equipment in what appears to be a promotional or documentary setting. No surgical trainer, laparoscopic instruments, or task-specific apparatus (pegs, gauze, Penrose drain, foam appendage, etc.) are visible. This is equipment/facility documentation, not an FLS performance video.
frame_analysis_summary: All 23 provided frames are identical or near-identical shots of the same person and equipment console. No dynamic task execution, no timing-relevant activity, no procedural phases.
recommendation: Please provide video of an actual FLS task performance (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture).
